title: Fresh Silky Kenyan Chicken Stir-fry
description: This fresh and silky dish features chicken stock concentrate in a light and flavorful stir-fry that's perfect for date nights or any casual meal.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: To sauté ingredients and deglaze pan

instructions: Season chicken pieces with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat, add chicken and sauté until golden brown on both sides.
Remove chicken from the pan and set aside. In the same pan, sauté onions and garlic until translucent.
Add green peppers to the pan and stir for 2-3 minutes, allowing them to soften slightly.
Deglaze the pan with a bit of water or broth if needed, scraping any browned bits from the bottom.
Return chicken back into the pan. Stir in tomato paste until fully incorporated, then add green peppers and onions.
Bring everything to a simmer, reduce heat to low, add thyme sprigs, and let it cook for about 5 minutes.
Stir in chicken stock concentrate with a splash of lemon juice. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Cook until the sauce thickens slightly and flavors are well integrated into the dish. Adjust consistency with water or broth as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or lemon wedges, if desired.
